verdict: The build order does NOT sequence cleanly toward the Godot North Star: the one ported slice (personal combat, 1/27) got two more deep passes at/after the Gate-0 freeze (R2 merged 07-04, R3 in flight, morphology audit), while Gate-0's blocking preconditions — Key v1→v2 migration, three-doc reconciliation, engine_clock authoring — stay unexecuted, and no surface names a playable-season milestone. Lineage fidelity is mostly sound (4/5 sampled supersessions faithful) but ED-912 carries a stale recheck path and the register is frozen ~1 week pre-HEAD (no GD-1, no mass-battle ED-MB). The steering layer is NOT one surface: workplan v5 and roadmap_state contradict CURRENT.md/decision_queue on J-38's status and on "where are we." Only CURRENT.md is fresh-and-authoritative.
key_points: Gate-0 (Key v2 migration, three-doc reconciliation, Key-type registrations) is the blocking precondition to any module port beyond combat and is entirely unexecuted (godot_conversion_strategy_v1.md VI.1, D1/R1/R3 = P1).

Combat (1/27 ported) is being deepened out of order — R2 merged 2026-07-04, R3 (PR#76) + morphology audit (PR#74) — while Gate-0 stayed frozen; the ported slice grows, the unblocking precondition does not.
engine_clock home doc is still 'unlocated [GAP]' (strategy L67); propagation_spec_v1 supplies only a candidate, module_contracts doc:null unflipped pending ED-1051.
No steering doc defines a playable-season / first end-to-end slice milestone.
3 highest-leverage moves: execute Gate-0; author engine_clock; reconcile steering + name a playable milestone.

BACKWARDS sample 5/5: 4 faithful (combat_v30→ED-900, VTM/CR-STRIKE, godot impl_sequence, PP-687); ED-912 recheck path designs/scene/articulation_layer_v30.md does not exist (moved to designs/articulation/).

supersession_register.yaml is frozen at ED-912/2026-06-28: no GD-1 entry (corroborates peninsular_strain Partition drift), no mass-battle ED-MB/FIELD_MOVEMENT flips, no propagation/contest supersessions.
Steering surfaces disagree: workplan v5 §3 J-38 = open 'PROPOSED design doc'; CURRENT.md L32 + decision_queue item 18 = CANONICAL/RATIFIED — direct contradiction.
roadmap_state.yaml updated 2026-06-28, current_phase 2 'Document undocumented subsystems' items_done 0 — describes a May track divorced from live work; self-indicts as a stale-log-class defect.
Only CURRENT.md's hand-reconciliation (2026-07-04) holds the surface together — single-point-of-truth fragility that CLAUDE.md §1 already concedes.

findings.claim: The Godot critical path (Gate-0: Key v1→v2 migration, three-doc reconciliation, engine_clock, Key-type registrations) is unexecuted while personal combat — the single ported slice (1/27) — received two more deep passes (R2 merged 2026-07-04, R3 PR#76, morphology audit PR#74) at/after the Gate-0 freeze; the ported slice is deepened, the precondition unblocking all other slices is not.
findings.tracked_ref: charter calibration (Gate-0 unexecuted, CLAUDE.md §6) — new scope: two combat passes landed 07-02/07-04 against the frozen gate

findings.claim: engine_clock — the temporal spine every system's Accounting cadence hangs off — still has an unlocated home doc; propagation_spec_v1 supplies only a candidate transform and module_contracts doc:null stays unflipped, so the highest-leverage architecture authoring after combat has not started.
findings.cite: designs/audit/2026-06-10-godot-conversion-strategy/godot_conversion_strategy_v1.md module row 8 (L67) 'home doc unlocated [GAP]'; CURRENT.md L32; module_contracts ED-1051

findings.claim: The four steering surfaces are not one: workplan v5 §3 frames J-38 propagation-spec as an OPEN decision 'lands as its own PROPOSED design doc' while CURRENT.md L32 and decision_queue item 18 both mark propagation_spec_v1 CANONICAL/RATIFIED (ED-1093/1094) — a direct status contradiction a resuming session hits immediately.
findings.cite: designs/workplans/valoria_master_workplan_v5.md §3 L74 vs CURRENT.md L32 vs designs/audit/2026-07-01-month-overview-architecture-consolidation/decision_queue.md L75,L100-101

findings.claim: roadmap_state.yaml (updated 2026-06-28, current_phase 2 'Document undocumented subsystems', items_done 0) describes a May audit track wholly divorced from the live combat/contest/architecture work; its own header declares stale roadmap a defect of the same class as a stale session log, so it is self-indicted.

The ED-912 supersession entry's files_to_recheck cites designs/scene/articulation_layer_v30.md §2.4, a path that no longer exists (live head moved to designs/articulation/articulation_layer_v30.md), so a session honoring the ED-912 Disposition/Knot ±5 propagation cannot follow the register to the actual articulation head that reads Bonds.
findings.cite: canon/supersession_register.yaml L238-247 vs ls designs/articulation/articulation_layer_v30.md (§2.3/§2.4 Bonds register)

findings.claim: supersession_register.yaml is frozen at ED-912/2026-06-28: it has no GD-1 entry (so peninsular_strain_v30 §6.3 Partition co-victory drift is invisible to the register), no mass-battle ED-MB/FIELD_MOVEMENT/PER_CELL default-flips, and no propagation-spec/contest-rebuild supersessions — supersession authority stops ~1 week before HEAD.
findings.cite: canon/supersession_register.yaml (full read, last entry ED-912; zero GD-1/mass_battle/FIELD_MOVEMENT hits)

findings.claim: No steering surface defines a playable-season or first end-to-end playable slice; the conversion strategy sequences module ports but names no integration milestone, so 'progress toward Godot' has no legible finish line to sequence against.
findings.cite: designs/audit/2026-06-10-godot-conversion-strategy/godot_conversion_strategy_v1.md §VI (port sequencing, no milestone); references/roadmap_state.yaml (phase table, no Godot milestone)
